description: Model a 200ft x 150ft hospital roof with a 40ft height in SketchUp Make 2017. Define an 80ft x 80ft helipad exclusion zone on the roof (using exact coordinate bounds: X:110' to 190', Y:35' to 115'). Use the Skelion plugin to fill the remaining outer roof area with a south-facing, 10-degree tilted solar array. The helipad area MUST remain completely clear of panels. Save the completed model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\hospital_helipad_solar.skp'.
